description: baseBranchPatterns overrides the org-level default of ["dev"] — this repo's default branch is main, and without this override Renovate would target a branch that does not exist here.

packageRules.description: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Language is deliberately frozen at 6.0.36. The generator reads Razor's internal syntax tree through a narrow seam; a version bump is a migration, not a dependency update. See docs/adr/0001-eol-razor-mitigation.md.
